method.description.explanation: Core description matches (mortality salience reducing utilitarian judgments); extracted adds Experiment 2 cognitive load details not in the reference description.

method.models.explanation: Extracted includes ANOVA (and t-tests), matching the reference's ANOVA.

method.independent_variables.explanation: Extracted includes mortality salience and scenario version (matching reference) but also adds cognitive load (Experiment 2 only).

method.control_variables.explanation: Reference is 'not stated' while extracted lists controls; not aligned with reference.
